_comment: Release notes shown to users via the 'What's New' modal on login. Newest first. The frontend tracks the 'version' field per-user in localStorage; if the latest version is newer than what they've seen, the modal appears. Bookkeeper / Admin can edit this file in-place when shipping new features.

entries.title: 🔍 Search/Sort/Date filters + 💰 Partial payments + 🛬 M&G stub endpoints
entries.summary: Bookkeeper backlog: search/sort/date-range in Approve queue, partial-payments tracking on internal invoices with auto-transition to paid when full amount reached. Plus Phase-3 prep: M&G stub endpoints live (graceful 503 until external dev side ships).
highlights: 🔍 Documents for Approval — new filter bar: search by vendor/file/amount (debounced 300ms), 6 sort options (date/amount/vendor/legal entity), date-from / date-to range, ✕ Clear button.

💰 Partial payments on internal invoices — toggle 'Internal invoice' in the detail modal. Add instalments (amount + paid_at + method + reference). Running progress bar. Auto-transition to status=paid when sum reaches invoice total.

🛬 Meet & Greet integration — three endpoints live as P85 graceful stubs at /api/mng/webhook, /api/mng/pull, /api/mng/status — returning 503 with hint until external dev team ships their side. Full contract in docs/meet-and-greet-dev-handoff.md.
📐 Stream Budgets architecture sketch — docs/stream-budgets-architecture.md describes the Phase-3 schema + X-alarm flow. Implementation ready to start in next session.

entries.title: 📋 Policies & Limits + ✓ Approved by Accounting + 🛬 Meet & Greet handoff
entries.summary: Internal corporate spending limits are now editable through a new Policies & Limits tab; Accounting can mark policy violations as reviewed (full audit log); Alveda/K2Y-style violations on already-approved invoices are hidden by default; and a self-contained dev-handoff doc for the Meet & Greet API bridge ships in /docs.
highlights: 📋 New tab — Policies & Limits (after FIO Legend): see every active spending rule (RED/YELLOW thresholds), edit limits inline (Admin/CEO), full change-log of who edited what when.
✓ Approved by Accounting checkbox on every Policy Violations row — click to record reason; toggle '[ ] Show resolved' to review history.
🤖 Policy violations on invoices already at confirmed_to_pay / paid / archived are now hidden by default — solves the K2Y/Alveda 'why is RED still showing after I approved it' confusion.
🔬 Classifier now reads thresholds from the DB (with graceful fallback to hardcoded defaults if table empty), so a CEO can change a corporate limit without a code deploy.

📨 Meet & Greet ↔ FIO API-bridge spec — bilingual (EN+RU) self-contained handoff doc for external developers in /docs/meet-and-greet-dev-handoff.md (webhook contract, pull API, auth, security checklist, 8-week timeline).

entries.title: ✏️ Editable chase template + 🎉 What's New on login
entries.summary: Bookkeeper can now customise the Asana/email task text used when chasing missing invoices, and new users see a release-notes popup the first time they log in after a change.
highlights: Admin tab → 📝 Chase task template — edit title + body with placeholders ({amount}, {vendor}, {date}, {pc}, ...)
Reset to defaults with one click; meta-line shows who last edited and when
🎉 What's New modal on login — current and recent releases at a glance

entries.title: 📊 Bank Statement Audit — month-close workflow
entries.summary: Card Audit renamed and expanded into a mandatory bookkeeper workflow for end-of-month reconciliation, including AI chase tasks for missing invoices.
highlights: Tab renamed Card Audit → Bank Statement Audit
🔐 Month-close checklist — 3 traffic-light checks (statements imported · all reconciled · every unmatched has owner)
🚀 Generate chase tasks — AI groups unmatched transactions by suggested business stream, produces per-tx Asana / email template, Open Asana / Copy buttons
📊 Monthly dashboard — tx count, money in/out/net, per-stream split, cases under investigation
Confidence % pill now shows scoring formula on hover (amount + date + vendor + payment method)
✓ Confirm button on suggested matches — promote suggested → manual in one click
⋯ Edit and Assign buttons now actually work (silent-bug fix from /transactions?limit=1)

entries.title: 🤖 AI follow-ups + bank reconciliation fixes
entries.summary: Self-review pass after the Top-10 shipped — gaps closed: AI badges, payment method radio, reparse endpoint, cross-period notices.
highlights: Upload → 📋 Already paid checkbox now has card / bank / cash / other radio (no more lying about cardholder)
Legal Entity dropdown shows 🤖 AI suggested / ⚙️ manual / ⚠ heuristic badge
🤖 Ask AI button next to empty Legal Entity dropdowns — re-runs parser to extract recipient
Card Audit Open buttons hop directly to the source invoice modal (no more 'transaction not found')
Cross-period notice when an invoice opens from a different month than your active filter

entries.title: 💳 Revolut import + Card Audit drill-down
entries.summary: Card Audit was broken on real Revolut Business CSV exports — now fixed. Plus the long-awaited 'where are my matched invoices' archive.
highlights: Revolut Business CSV import works end-to-end (was silently falling through to generic)
Card Audit archive of past imports + per-batch CSV download with match results
Mark Paid empty-state has a teleport CTA — '+ Add my first paying account' jumps to Admin tab
Server-side bank CSV auto-route — drop a Revolut CSV in Upload and it goes to Card Audit automatically
Dropped 'needs_to_pay' redundant state — payment state is now in_progress / on_hold / paid

entries.title: 🏦 Paying accounts + comment cascade
entries.summary: Bookkeeper roster of bank accounts, comment cascade between stages, FIO Legend with per-role responsibility cards.
highlights: Admin tab → 🏦 Paying accounts roster, Mark Paid now uses a real dropdown
Bookkeeper / CEO comments cascade forward through Confirm-for-Payment stages
Wider comment column in Awaiting Payment with expand-on-focus
FIO Legend — per-role cards (Uploader / Stream owner / Bookkeeper / Holding CEO / HR / Admin)
